recent: review mistakes in time	及时复盘错误。
play a crucial role in	在……中起关键作用。

Instead of waiting for motivation, we should rely on discipline.	与其等待动力，不如依靠自律。

把任务拆成更小的步骤，会让日常坚持变得更容易。	Breaking a task into smaller steps makes daily persistence easier.
